working_on.task: Packaged extension-hub as global npm package. CLI entry, package.json, .npmignore, README, USER-GUIDE.md. Pushed to GitHub.

pending_tasks.notes: Cancel, retry, reconnect flows. Plan at plans/260308-1959-phase2-polish/phase-05-resilient-sessions.md
Plan reviewed through Codex rounds. Key: file API, syntax highlighting, XSS safety, IDE links.

pending_tasks.task: Fix remaining lint errors in session.js
pending_tasks.notes: Pre-existing: _groupFindings {} type errors, fromJSON null/undefined mismatches. Not blocking.

recent_changes.description: Phase 4 review: Fixed XSS in index.html (escapeHtml), separated 400/500 error codes in api-routes.js, validated NaN after param

Phase 5 review (5 rounds): Fixed 8 bugs in server.js — session save after finalize, start() reject on bind error, catch terminal status event, path traversal bypass, reviewOptions guard for MCP-only, bind 127.0.0.1, isFile check, removeListener instead of removeAllListeners
Added Step 3.1 cleanup to codex-review-loop workflow: delete all session data after tổng kết

errors_encountered.error: Codex MCP adapter stalls (3 consecutive times)
errors_encountered.context: Creating review sessions via Hub API, Codex process never completes. watchdog.stalled=true
errors_encountered.solution: Restart Hub server (node src/server.js). Fresh restart resolves the stall.

decisions_made.reason: Codex Round 3 finding — no reason to expose unauthenticated Hub API on LAN
Legacy codex adapter still registered, expects string prompt. Only MCP adapters handle structured reviewOptions.

decisions_made.decision: Reject CORS wildcard finding as standard for localhost dev tools
decisions_made.reason: vite, webpack-dev-server all use Access-Control-Allow-Origin:*. Rebuttal won — Codex withdrew.

decisions_made.decision: Reject static file stream TOCTOU as purely theoretical
decisions_made.reason: Localhost dashboard serves 2-3 immutable files. Rejected 3 times, Codex withdrew 3 times.

decisions_made.decision: Add session cleanup step to codex-review-loop workflow
decisions_made.reason: After 5-round review, session data accumulates. Step 3.1 ensures clean Hub data.
